report.summary: Day 71 standup v13: Build-9 shipped RaaS Providers guide (~501 lines) + Staking-as-a-Service guide (~728 lines) — both queued. Design-v12 created 3 OG images + fixed broken OG ref + accessibility improvements. Community-v11 drafted 5 tweets (#97-101 incl. 6-part EigenLayer thread) + newsletter v21 + 2 SVG cards. Publish-v6 promoted SDP Guide + Agentic Payments (queue emptied, refilled by build-9). EOD-v12 confirmed 498 published slugs, 769 uncommitted items. Git locks Day 8 — deploy gap ~160 pages. 63 agent runs today.

sections.title: Analytics
items: DELTA SINCE STANDUP v12: 5 agents ran (build-9, design-v12, community-v11, publish-v6, eod-v12). 63 total runs today (standup×13, build×9, design×12, community×11, publish×6, eod×12).

BUILD-9 OUTPUT: 2 new learn guides — RaaS Providers Compared 2026 (~501 lines, covers Conduit/Caldera/Gelato/AltLayer, modular stack, $354M market by 2032) + Staking-as-a-Service Providers Compared 2026 (~728 lines, covers Lido/Kiln/Figment/P2P.org/Coinbase, $33.3B AUM projected, institutional vs retail matrix). Both added to PUBLISH_QUEUE.

DESIGN-v12: Created 3 OG images (RaaS guide, Staking providers, Funding Rate Tracker). Fixed broken OG image reference on funding rate tracker (.png→.svg). Fixed duplicate-word typo in RaaS guide. Added accessibility attrs (aria-label, scope) to comparison tables.
PUBLISH-v6: Promoted SDP Guide + Agentic Payments Protocols to PUBLISHED_PAGES. Queue emptied then refilled by build-9 with RaaS + Staking-as-a-Service. 498 published slugs total.

COMMUNITY-v11 OUTPUT: 5 social posts (#97-101: 6-part EigenLayer restaking thread, SDP enterprise launch, BlackRock ETHB staked ETF, F&G divergence contrarian, restaking companion) + newsletter v21 (Thu Mar 27) + 2 SVG cards (restaking architecture diagram + SDP enterprise launch) + content calendar v25 (11 posts through Mar 27).
EOD-v12: 498 published slugs (+4 from v11). 769 uncommitted items (+7 from v11, all report files). 46 TS errors unchanged. Deploy drift 7 days. 5/6 API routes healthy (market-metrics still 404).

MARKET (from production APIs): BTC ~$69,382 (softening from $71K earlier). ETH ~$2,160. SOL ~$90. F&G 11 (Extreme Fear Day 47). BTC dominance 56.36%. Total market cap $2.46T. CoinGecko API 65ms response, healthy.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: DONE SINCE STANDUP v12: build-9 (RaaS guide + Staking guide), design-v12 (3 OG images + UX/accessibility fixes), community-v11 (5 tweets + newsletter v21 + 2 SVGs), publish-v6 (2 pages promoted), eod-v12 (verification). 5 agents ran = $452 human-equivalent.

PIPELINE HEALTH: PUBLISH_QUEUE at 2 items (RaaS guide, Staking-as-a-Service guide). Queue rotation working — emptied and refilled within one cycle. 61+ guides built, 66+ OG images, 131+ social posts, 52+ SVG cards, 21 newsletters.
TOTAL INVENTORY: 498 published slugs in PUBLISHED_PAGES. 1,142 page.tsx files locally. ~338 live in production (stale Mar 17 commit e999560). Deploy gap: ~160 pages.

BLOCKER [P0 — DAY 8]: Git locks (.git/HEAD.lock + .git/index.lock) still present since Mar 16. 769 uncommitted files. ALL content since Mar 17 is local-only. Jefe action required: rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock → git add . → git commit → git push.
BLOCKER [P1]: /api/market-metrics returns 404 in production — route.ts exists locally but never committed.
CARRY-OVER [P1]: /trading and /trading/learn return 404 — hub page.tsx missing.
CARRY-OVER [P1]: TS errors at 46 across 3 files (crypto-arbitrage unescaped >, crypto-index-funds, structured-data.examples.ts).
CARRY-OVER [P1]: Rate limiter coverage 0/6 core API routes.
BUG FIXED THIS CYCLE: Broken OG image reference on funding rate tracker (.png→.svg). Duplicate-word typo in RaaS guide. Accessibility improvements on comparison tables.
TODAY'S AGENT RUNS: standup×13, build×9, design×12, community×11, publish×6, eod×12 = 63 runs.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — CLEAR GIT LOCKS + DEPLOY 160-PAGE BACKLOG: Deploy gap at ~160 pages (498 declared vs ~338 live). 8 days of content invisible to Google. BTC softening to ~$69K but institutional narratives compounding (ETF $2.5B inflows, BlackRock ETHB, Invesco $900M tokenized fund, Solana SDP). One unlock + push = 47% content increase deployed instantly. April 15 tax deadline 22 days away — Tax-Loss Harvesting guide window closing.

PRIORITY 2 — PROMOTE RaaS + STAKING-AS-A-SERVICE GUIDES: 2 new items in PUBLISH_QUEUE. RaaS captures the modular blockchain narrative ($354M market, 100+ rollups live). Staking-as-a-Service captures institutional staking surge ($33.3B projected AUM, BlackRock ETHB as catalyst). Both are infrastructure-level guides that compound with existing content (EigenLayer restaking, liquid staking, modular blockchain stack guides).

PRIORITY 3 — AMPLIFY RESTAKING + SDP SOCIAL CONTENT: Community-v11 drafted a 6-part EigenLayer restaking thread — our first social push on $20B TVR story. SDP enterprise launch tweets timed for today's Mastercard/WU/Worldpay news cycle. 11 posts scheduled through Mar 27 via content calendar v25. Ensure timely posting to capture peak attention windows.

STRATEGIC NOTE: Day 71 — 63 agent runs producing $4,939 human-equivalent work at ~$0 marginal cost. Content pipeline is now self-sustaining: build creates → publish promotes → design polishes → community amplifies → eod verifies → standup tracks. Three OG images and accessibility fixes this cycle show design audit catching issues that build/scaffold miss (broken .png ref would have caused blank social previews). Critical path unchanged: git locks → deploy → index → rank.
